entries.summary: Phase 1: Codebase inventory completed. Full file map produced, all trust boundaries cataloged, orphan files identified.

metadata.plan_id: Comprehensive Codebase QA Review — AI-Hardened Edition

lessons_learned: Repo only has master branch, not main — use origin/master for rebase
pyproject.toml does not exist; requirements.txt is the only dependency manifest
4 root-level orphan test files are exact duplicates of tests/ counterparts
LSP is already flagging type errors in api_server.py, app_gui.py, document_processor.py, and llm_interface.py — these are pre-existing findings to capture during audit
